name: Simulated Cat Tongue Brush, Practical Cat Comb Professional Durable Safe for Cat Daily Hair Caring(Green+Gold)
description: Feature:1. Innovative Design: The cat tongue comb is inspired by real cat tongues and can be used for daily hair care of short haired cats.2. Imitating Cat Tongue Combing: Imitating cat tongue, it can stimulate the secretion of sebaceous glands, make the hair shiny and smoother.3. High Quality Materials: Made of sturdy and durable ABS material. Scratch resistant, durable, and recyclable.4. Establish An Intimate Bond With Your Cat: For cats, licking is a sign of love. Cat tongue design allows your cat to feel more love.5. Practicality: Daily care of cat combs can greatly reduce pet fur deposite
